summary: Initial BIOME monorepo build session — scaffolded Manifest AI Discovery App, built Core Engine, deployed Supabase schema, created Control Centre health monitor.

milestones.name: Project Scaffold
milestones.description: Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS scaffold with Supabase init

milestones.name: Discovery Workbook UI
milestones.description: 8 templates, 25 fields, Solarpunk Daylight design, progress tracking, story summary

commits.message: feat: scaffold Manifest AI Discovery App (Milestone 1)
feat: BIOME architecture baseline — ENR types, Canopy theme, Supabase schema
feat: connect Supabase — Manifest AI project live with ENR schema
feat: Milestone 2 — Discovery workbook UI with 8 templates and 25 fields
refactor: establish BIOME monorepo with core engine architecture
feat: build BIOME Core Engine — services, hooks, auth, generated types
feat: BIOME Control Centre — health monitor dashboard in Canopy mode
chore: add root .gitignore for node_modules and .env

monorepo_structure.core: @biome/core — ENR types, services, hooks, audit, auth, Supabase client, UI components

architecture_standards_met: SSOT — data defined once in Supabase, TypeScript types mirror schema
ENR — EntityNode, FieldNode, Edge types + database tables + services
Field Node — atomic unit with id, key, value, version, source_form, referenced_by[]
Audit Trail — immutable audit_log table, append-only, auto-logged on mutations
Canvas Chain — ordered steps with depends_on[] dependency enforcement
RLS — row-level security enabled on all 6 tables

design_systems.daylight: Client-facing — cream #F7F4ED bg, Georgia serif, warm palette (used by Manifest AI)
design_systems.canopy: Internal tools — dark bg, glass morphism, Fira Code mono, moss glows (used by Control Centre)

next_steps: M3: Wire Manifest AI fields to Supabase persistence
Deploy Manifest AI and Control Centre to Vercel
Build out BIOME Intelligence and Productions apps
Migrate prototype repos into prototypes/ folder
